sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19758" key="belehfo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βελεηφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n19758.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing darts,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.111</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
